title: Citrusy Pillowy Filipino Fenugreek Papillote
description: A flavorful and comforting Filipino-inspired dish featuring fenugreek, steamed in a pillow of citrusy goodness. Perfect for a lazy Sunday morning.

ingredients.name: Fenugreek leaves
ingredients.notes: Choose fresh leaves with no signs of wilting.

ingredients.name: Coconut milk
ingredients.notes: Full-fat or low-fat, whichever suits your taste.

instructions: Combine fenugreek leaves, lime juice, coconut milk, sugar, salt, black pepper, galangal, and ginger in a bowl. Mix well to coat the fenugreek evenly.
Heat a steamer or a pot with a steamer basket over boiling water.
Cut banana leaves into large squares, enough to wrap each serving as a papillote.
Place a large spoonful of the fenugreek mixture on the center of each banana leaf square.
Fold the banana leaves over the filling, creating a neat package.
Place the papillotes in the steamer, seam-side down, and steam for 10 minutes.
Remove the papillotes from the steamer and serve immediately, garnished with green chilies and a squeeze of lime juice.
